from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor

from audit_event import audit_event
from request_scope import current_request_id, request_scope
from work_dispatch import submit_with_request


def test_reused_worker_observes_each_submission_scope_without_leakage():
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=1) as executor:
        with request_scope("req-parent"):
            with request_scope("req-first"):
                first = submit_with_request(
                    executor, lambda: audit_event("first")
                )

            assert current_request_id() == "req-parent"

            with request_scope("req-second"):
                second = submit_with_request(
                    executor, lambda: audit_event("second")
                )

            assert current_request_id() == "req-parent"

        assert first.result(timeout=2)["request_id"] == "req-first"
        assert second.result(timeout=2)["request_id"] == "req-second"

    assert current_request_id() is None
